title: Sudoku for the Golden Years
subtitle: A Beautiful Retirement Gift: 240 Large-Print Puzzles from Gentle Warm-Ups to Satisfying Challenges — One Puzzle Per Page with Full Solutions
author: Eleanor Hart
description_plain: The sudoku book you would actually want to give. Designed as a refined retirement gift, this collection brings together 240 hand-verified puzzles — 60 gentle warm-ups, 120 satisfying mid-level challenges, and 60 thoughtful finishers — each one printed one per page in comfortable large print. Every grid has exactly one solution. Every page is a quiet invitation to slow down, focus, and enjoy the new chapter ahead.
cover_prompt: A COMMERCIAL, VISUAL-HEAVY retirement-gift sudoku book cover for 'Sudoku for the Golden Years'. Portrait 8.5x11 full-bleed. Background: deep navy (#1B3A5C) with a subtle faded sudoku-grid pattern texture in slightly lighter navy. TOP-LEFT CORNER: a bright red pill-shape badge with bold white text '2026 EDITION'. TOP-RIGHT CORNER: a gold pill-shape badge with white text '3 LEVELS' followed by three small stars in graduated colors (silver, gold, bronze). CENTER/UPPER HALF: the word 'SUDOKU' in HUGE bold sans-serif white typography (Impact or Anton style), very large, filling most of the upper half horizontally, all caps. Directly below it: 'FOR THE GOLDEN YEARS' in elegant champagne gold (#D4A857) serif type (Playfair Display), smaller, all caps, perfectly centered. Below that, a wide red banner containing white bold text '240 PUZZLES' with two stars on each side. MIDDLE TO BOTTOM: three sample white sudoku puzzle grids, overlapping diagonally (like fanned playing cards), showing realistic 9x9 grids with some numbers filled in, centered in the lower half of the cover, each grid with clean thick borders. BOTTOM BANNER: a cream-ivory (#F7F1E3) horizontal strip with dark text 'LARGE PRINT · GIFT EDITION FOR ADULTS & SENIORS'. At the very bottom of the navy area, in small gold text: the author name 'ELEANOR HART' in small caps letter-spacing +3. NO confetti, balloons, cartoons, grandpa glasses, 'Congrats!' banners, or dated clipart. Mood: confident, commercial, giftable, visible at thumbnail size. Aesthetic reference: bestselling sudoku books on Amazon with bold typography, visible sample grids, promise badges, and a polished navy-and-gold color scheme that still signals 'premium gift' rather than 'generic mass-market'.
positioning: The sudoku book you'd actually want to gift — beautiful, thoughtful, made for celebrating retirement.
